-- This script was generated by the ERD tool in pgAdmin 4.
-- Please log an issue at https://github.com/pgadmin-org/pgadmin4/issues/new/choose if you find any bugs, including reproduction steps.
BEGIN;


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.alteracoes
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    usuario_id bigint NOT NULL,
    status alteracoes_status NOT NULL,
    observacao text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    tombo_hcf bigint NOT NULL,
    tombo_json text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    ativo boolean,
    identificacao boolean,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41012_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.autores
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    observacao character varying(500) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41023_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.colecoes_anexas
(
    tipo colecoes_anexas_tipo NOT NULL,
    observacoes text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41038_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.coletores
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    email character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41047_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.coletores_complementares
(
    hcf bigint NOT NULL,
    complementares character varying(1000) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41054_primary PRIMARY KEY (hcf)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.configuracao
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    hora_inicio character varying(19) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    hora_fim character varying(19) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
    periodicidade configuracao_periodicidade,
    data_proxima_atualizacao character varying(10) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
    nome_arquivo character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
    servico configuracao_servico,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41062_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.enderecos
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    logradouro character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    numero character varying(10) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
    complemento text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    cidade_id bigint,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41070_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.especies
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    autor_id bigint,
    genero_id bigint,
    familia_id bigint NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41080_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.estados
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    sigla character(4) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::bpchar,
    pais_id integer NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41087_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.familias
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    reino_id bigint NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41095_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.fase_sucessional
(
    numero bigint NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41101_primary PRIMARY KEY (numero)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.generos
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    familia_id bigint NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41107_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.herbarios
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    caminho_logotipo text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    sigla character varying(80) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    email character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
    endereco_id bigint,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41114_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.historico_acessos
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    data_criacao timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    usuario_id bigint NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41124_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.identificadores
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41129_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.locais_coleta
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    descricao text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    cidade_id bigint,
    fase_sucessional_id bigint,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    fase_numero bigint,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41136_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.migrations
(
    name character varying(300) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    applied_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41144_primary PRIMARY KEY (name)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.paises
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    sigla character(4) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::bpchar,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41149_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.reflora
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    cod_barra character varying(12) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
    tombo_json text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    ja_comparou boolean DEFAULT false,
    ja_requisitou boolean DEFAULT false,
    nro_requisicoes bigint DEFAULT '0'::bigint,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41157_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.reinos
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41168_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.relevos
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(300) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41175_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.remessas
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    observacao text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    data_envio timestamp with time zone,
    entidade_destino_id bigint NOT NULL,
    herbario_id bigint NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41182_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.retirada_exsiccata_tombos
(
    retirada_exsiccata_id bigint NOT NULL,
    tombo_hcf bigint NOT NULL,
    tipo retirada_exsiccata_tombos_tipo NOT NULL,
    data_vencimento timestamp with time zone,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    devolvido boolean DEFAULT false,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41190_primary PRIMARY KEY (retirada_exsiccata_id, tombo_hcf)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.solos
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(300) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41197_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.specieslink
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    cod_barra character varying(12) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
    tombo_json text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    ja_comparou boolean DEFAULT false,
    ja_requisitou boolean DEFAULT false,
    nro_requisicoes bigint DEFAULT '0'::bigint,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41204_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.sub_especies
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    especie_id bigint NOT NULL,
    genero_id bigint,
    familia_id bigint NOT NULL,
    autor_id bigint,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41215_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.sub_familias
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(300) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    familia_id bigint NOT NULL,
    autor_id bigint,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41222_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.telefones
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    numero character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    herbario_id bigint NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41229_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.tipos
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(250) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41234_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.tipos_usuarios
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    tipo character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41241_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.tombo_alteracoes_antigas
(
    sequencia bigint NOT NULL,
    data date,
    descricao text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    tombo_hcf bigint NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41278_primary PRIMARY KEY (sequencia, tombo_hcf)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.tombos
(
    hcf bigserial NOT NULL,
    data_tombo timestamp with time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    data_coleta_dia bigint,
    observacao text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    nomes_populares text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    numero_coleta bigint,
    latitude double precision,
    longitude double precision,
    altitude double precision,
    entidade_id bigint,
    local_coleta_id bigint,
    variedade_id bigint,
    tipo_id bigint,
    data_identificacao_dia smallint,
    data_identificacao_mes smallint,
    data_identificacao_ano integer,
    situacao tombos_situacao DEFAULT 'REGULAR'::tombos_situacao,
    especie_id bigint,
    genero_id bigint,
    familia_id bigint,
    sub_familia_id bigint,
    sub_especie_id bigint,
    nome_cientifico text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    colecao_anexa_id bigint,
    data_coleta_mes bigint,
    data_coleta_ano bigint,
    solo_id bigint,
    relevo_id bigint,
    vegetacao_id bigint,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    ativo boolean DEFAULT true,
    taxon character varying(45) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
    rascunho boolean DEFAULT false,
    coletor_id bigint,
    descricao text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    unicata boolean,
    cidade_id bigint,
    fase_sucessional_id bigint,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41249_primary PRIMARY KEY (hcf)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.tombos_fotos
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    tombo_hcf bigint NOT NULL,
    codigo_barra character varying(45) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT ''::character varying,
    num_barra character varying(45) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT ''::character varying,
    caminho_foto text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    em_vivo boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
    sequencia bigint,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41263_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.tombos_identificadores
(
    identificador_id bigint NOT NULL,
    tombo_hcf bigint NOT NULL,
    ordem smallint DEFAULT '1'::smallint,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41274_primary PRIMARY KEY (identificador_id, tombo_hcf)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.usuarios
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    ra character varying(45) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
    email character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    senha character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    tipo_usuario_id bigint NOT NULL,
    telefone character varying(45) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
    herbario_id bigint NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    token_troca_senha character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
    token_troca_senha_expiracao timestamp with time zone,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41284_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.variedades
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(200) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    autor_id bigint,
    especie_id bigint NOT NULL,
    genero_id bigint,
    familia_id bigint NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41296_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.vegetacoes
(
    id bigserial NOT NULL,
    nome character varying(300) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT idx_41303_primary PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.alteracoes
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_alteracoes_tombo FOREIGN KEY (tombo_hcf)
    REFERENCES public.tombos (hcf) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41012_fk_alteracoes_tombo
    ON public.alteracoes(tombo_hcf);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.alteracoes
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_alteracoes_usuario FOREIGN KEY (usuario_id)
    REFERENCES public.usuarios (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41012_fk_alteracoes_usuario
    ON public.alteracoes(usuario_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.coletores_complementares
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_coletores_complementares_tombo FOREIGN KEY (hcf)
    REFERENCES public.tombos (hcf) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41054_primary
    ON public.coletores_complementares(hcf);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.especies
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_especies_autor FOREIGN KEY (autor_id)
    REFERENCES public.autores (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41080_fk_especies_autor
    ON public.especies(autor_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.especies
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_especies_familia FOREIGN KEY (familia_id)
    REFERENCES public.familias (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41080_fk_especies_familia
    ON public.especies(familia_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.especies
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_especies_genero FOREIGN KEY (genero_id)
    REFERENCES public.generos (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41080_fk_especies_genero
    ON public.especies(genero_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.estados
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_estados_paises FOREIGN KEY (pais_id)
    REFERENCES public.paises (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.generos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_generos_familias FOREIGN KEY (familia_id)
    REFERENCES public.familias (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41107_fk_generos_familias
    ON public.generos(familia_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.herbarios
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_herbarios_endereco FOREIGN KEY (endereco_id)
    REFERENCES public.enderecos (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41114_fk_herbarios_endereco
    ON public.herbarios(endereco_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.locais_coleta
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_99i0itontmoklfxmoo8armtnv FOREIGN KEY (fase_numero)
    REFERENCES public.fase_sucessional (numero) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41136_fk_99i0itontmoklfxmoo8armtnv
    ON public.locais_coleta(fase_numero);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.locais_coleta
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_locais_coleta_fase_sucessional1 FOREIGN KEY (fase_sucessional_id)
    REFERENCES public.fase_sucessional (numero) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41136_fk_locais_coleta_fase_sucessional1_idx
    ON public.locais_coleta(fase_sucessional_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.remessas
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_remessas_herbario FOREIGN KEY (herbario_id)
    REFERENCES public.herbarios (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41182_fk_remessas_herbario
    ON public.remessas(herbario_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.retirada_exsiccata_tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_retirada_exsiccata_tombos_remessa FOREIGN KEY (retirada_exsiccata_id)
    REFERENCES public.remessas (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41190_fk_retirada_exsiccata_tombos_remessa
    ON public.retirada_exsiccata_tombos(retirada_exsiccata_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.retirada_exsiccata_tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_retirada_exsiccata_tombos_tombo FOREIGN KEY (tombo_hcf)
    REFERENCES public.tombos (hcf) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41190_fk_retirada_exsiccata_tombos_tombo
    ON public.retirada_exsiccata_tombos(tombo_hcf);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.sub_especies
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_sub_especies_autor FOREIGN KEY (autor_id)
    REFERENCES public.autores (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41215_fk_sub_especies_autor
    ON public.sub_especies(autor_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.sub_especies

    REFERENCES public.especies (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;

    ON public.sub_especies(especie_id);

    REFERENCES public.familias (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;

    ON public.sub_especies(familia_id);

    REFERENCES public.generos (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT

    ON public.sub_especies(genero_id);

    REFERENCES public.autores (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;

    ON public.sub_familias(autor_id);

    REFERENCES public.familias (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;

    ON public.sub_familias(familia_id);

    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_telefones_herbario FOREIGN KEY (herbario_id)
    REFERENCES public.herbarios (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41229_fk_telefones_herbario
    ON public.telefones(herbario_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombo_alteracoes_antigas
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombo_alteracoes_antigas_tombo FOREIGN KEY (tombo_hcf)
    REFERENCES public.tombos (hcf) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41278_fk_tombo_alteracoes_antigas_tombo
    ON public.tombo_alteracoes_antigas(tombo_hcf);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_colecao_anexa FOREIGN KEY (colecao_anexa_id)
    REFERENCES public.colecoes_anexas (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41249_fk_tombos_colecao_anexa
    ON public.tombos(colecao_anexa_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_entidade FOREIGN KEY (entidade_id)
    REFERENCES public.herbarios (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41249_fk_tombos_entidade
    ON public.tombos(entidade_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_especie FOREIGN KEY (especie_id)
    REFERENCES public.especies (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41249_fk_tombos_especie
    ON public.tombos(especie_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_familia FOREIGN KEY (familia_id)
    REFERENCES public.familias (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41249_fk_tombos_familia
    ON public.tombos(familia_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_genero FOREIGN KEY (genero_id)
    REFERENCES public.generos (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41249_fk_tombos_genero
    ON public.tombos(genero_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_local_coleta FOREIGN KEY (local_coleta_id)
    REFERENCES public.locais_coleta (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41249_fk_tombos_local_coleta
    ON public.tombos(local_coleta_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_relevo FOREIGN KEY (relevo_id)
    REFERENCES public.relevos (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41249_fk_tombos_relevo
    ON public.tombos(relevo_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_solo FOREIGN KEY (solo_id)
    REFERENCES public.solos (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41249_fk_tombos_solo
    ON public.tombos(solo_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_sub_especie FOREIGN KEY (sub_especie_id)
    REFERENCES public.sub_especies (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41249_fk_tombos_sub_especie
    ON public.tombos(sub_especie_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_sub_familia FOREIGN KEY (sub_familia_id)
    REFERENCES public.sub_familias (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41249_fk_tombos_sub_familia
    ON public.tombos(sub_familia_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_tipo FOREIGN KEY (tipo_id)
    REFERENCES public.tipos (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41249_fk_tombos_tipo
    ON public.tombos(tipo_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_vegetacao FOREIGN KEY (vegetacao_id)
    REFERENCES public.vegetacoes (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41249_fk_tombos_vegetacao
    ON public.tombos(vegetacao_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos_fotos
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_fotos_tombo FOREIGN KEY (tombo_hcf)
    REFERENCES public.tombos (hcf) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41263_fk_tombos_fotos_tombo
    ON public.tombos_fotos(tombo_hcf);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos_identificadores
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_identificadores_identificador FOREIGN KEY (identificador_id)
    REFERENCES public.identificadores (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41274_fk_tombos_identificadores_identificador
    ON public.tombos_identificadores(identificador_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tombos_identificadores
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_tombos_identificadores_tombo FOREIGN KEY (tombo_hcf)
    REFERENCES public.tombos (hcf) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41274_fk_tombos_identificadores_tombo
    ON public.tombos_identificadores(tombo_hcf);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.usuarios
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_usuarios_herbario FOREIGN KEY (herbario_id)
    REFERENCES public.herbarios (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41284_fk_usuarios_herbario
    ON public.usuarios(herbario_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.usuarios
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_usuarios_tipo_usuario FOREIGN KEY (tipo_usuario_id)
    REFERENCES public.tipos_usuarios (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41284_fk_usuarios_tipo_usuario
    ON public.usuarios(tipo_usuario_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.variedades
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_variedades_autor FOREIGN KEY (autor_id)
    REFERENCES public.autores (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41296_fk_variedades_autor
    ON public.variedades(autor_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.variedades
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_variedades_especie FOREIGN KEY (especie_id)
    REFERENCES public.especies (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41296_fk_variedades_especie
    ON public.variedades(especie_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.variedades
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_variedades_familia FOREIGN KEY (familia_id)
    REFERENCES public.familias (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41296_fk_variedades_familia
    ON public.variedades(familia_id);


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.variedades
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_variedades_genero FOREIGN KEY (genero_id)
    REFERENCES public.generos (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE RESTRICT
    ON DELETE RESTRICT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_41296_fk_variedades_genero
    ON public.variedades(genero_id);

END;
